name.description: The name of the virtual network link.

private_dns_zone_name.description: The name of the private DNS zone to link with the virtual network.

registration_enabled.description: Indicates whether registration is enabled for the virtual network.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.

virtual_network_id.description: The ID of the virtual network to be linked.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
